## Type of Change
<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] UI/Style update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security fix

- [ ] Unit tests (Jest / Vitest)
- [ ] Integration tests (Supertest)

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (ESLint/Prettier)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] All tests pass in CI/CD pipeline

### Security & Performance
- [ ] No sensitive data (passwords, tokens, secrets) is exposed
- [ ] API endpoints are properly authenticated/authorized
- [ ] Database queries are optimized (no N+1 queries)
- [ ] Input validation is implemented for all user inputs

### Deployment
- [ ] Environment variables are documented
- [ ] Database migrations are included (if applicable)
- [ ] Feature flags are configured (if applicable)
- [ ] Rollback plan is documented

<!-- Add any other context about the PR here -->

- [ ] No new dependencies added
